page.title: Custom SIM Profile
page.description: Bundle APN, IMEI, and TTL/HL settings into one-click profiles.

table.empty_row: No profiles yet. Create one to get started.

delete_confirm.title: Delete Profile
delete_confirm.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone. Deleting this profile won't change your current modem configuration.

form.create_description: Create a custom SIM profile with specific APN, TTL, and IMEI settings.

fields.imei_placeholder: Leave blank to keep current IMEI

activate_dialog.title: Activate Profile
activate_dialog.description: Apply "{{name}}" to the modem? This will update APN, TTL/HL, and IMEI settings as configured in the profile. Unchanged settings will be skipped.

deactivate_dialog.title: Deactivate Profile
deactivate_dialog.description: Clear the active profile marker? The modem's current settings (APN, IMEI, TTL) will not be reverted — only the "Active" badge will be removed.

apply_dialog.title: Applying Profile
apply_dialog.reboot_notice: Modem is restarting to apply IMEI change. Dashboard will reconnect automatically.

verizon_warning.title: Verizon requires a special data routing rule
verizon_warning.body_intro: Verizon's network only delivers data on a non-default channel on this modem. To make Data and SMS work, QManager will configure a custom data-path rule when you activate this profile.
verizon_warning.body_warning_lead: Important — once active, do not manually clear or release this rule.
verizon_warning.body_warning_rest: Doing so can leave the modem unable to restore its default routing until a firmware re-flash. QManager handles cleanup safely when you switch to another profile.

empty_state.title: No Custom Profiles
empty_state.description: Manage your custom SIM profiles here.
empty_state.description_full: You have not created any custom SIM profiles yet. Use the form to create your first profile.

page.title: Connection Scenarios
page.description: Manage and customize connection scenarios for your cellular profiles to optimize network performance and reliability.

delete_confirm.title: Delete Scenario
delete_confirm.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

page.title: SMS Center
page.description: View, manage, and send SMS messages from your modem.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.description: View and manage your SMS messages

delete_single_confirm.title: Delete Message
delete_single_confirm.description: Are you sure you want to delete this message from {{sender}}? This action cannot be undone.

delete_all_confirm.title: Delete All Messages
delete_all_confirm.description: Are you sure you want to delete all {{count}} messages? This action cannot be undone.

delete_selected_confirm.title: Delete Selected Messages
delete_selected_confirm.description_one: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} selected message? This action cannot be undone.
delete_selected_confirm.description_other: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} selected messages? This action cannot be undone.

compose.title: New Message
compose.description: Compose and send an SMS message.
compose.limit_warning: Message exceeds single SMS limit. It will be sent as multiple parts.

page.title: Band Locking
page.description: Restrict which LTE and NR bands the modem can use.

band_locking.scenario_override_banner: Band configuration is managed by the {{scenario_name}} scenario.

settings_card.title: Band Locking Settings
settings_card.description: Restrict the modem to specific LTE and 5G bands. Enable failover to fall back to all bands if locked bands lose signal.
settings_card.band_failover_tooltip: When enabled, the device will automatically switch to the default bands if the locked bands are unavailable after 15 seconds.

lte.title: LTE Band Locking
lte.description: Select the LTE bands to lock for your device.

nsa_nr5g.title: NSA Band Locking
nsa_nr5g.description: Select the 5G NSA bands to lock (5G via LTE anchor).

sa_nr5g.title: SA Band Locking
sa_nr5g.description: Select the 5G SA bands to lock (standalone 5G).

band_locking.card_empty: No supported bands reported by the modem for this category.

toast.select_one_band: Select at least one band to lock

page.title: Tower Locking
page.description: Lock onto specific cell towers by PCI and EARFCN.

settings.title: Tower Locking Settings
settings.description_loading: Lock the modem to a specific cell tower. Keeps your connection stable instead of roaming between towers.
settings.description: Lock the modem to a specific cell tower. Keeps your connection stable instead of roaming between towers. Not compatible with 5G NSA.
settings.persist_tooltip: When enabled, tower lock is restored automatically after a reboot.
settings.failover_tooltip: When enabled, the device will unlock from the tower if signal quality degrades below a certain threshold or becomes unavailable.
settings.failover_hint: Failover is off — enable it to auto-unlock on poor signal.
settings.threshold_tooltip: This will only take effect if Failover is enabled. Set the signal quality threshold below which the device will unlock from the tower.
settings.settings_unavailable_toast: Settings unavailable — try refreshing the page

lte.title: LTE Tower Locking
lte.description: Lock to a specific LTE cell tower by entering its channel and cell ID.
lte.enabled_tooltip: Force the modem to attach only to specific LTE cells, identified by EARFCN and PCI. Useful for pinning to a known-good tower when the modem keeps drifting between weaker cells.

simple_mode.info_tooltip: Pick from your modem's currently active carriers
simple_mode.empty_tooltip: No active LTE carriers detected — connect first, or use Custom mode

lock_dialog.title: Lock to LTE Tower?
lock_dialog.description_single: This will lock your modem to EARFCN {{earfcn}}, PCI {{pci}}. The modem will only connect to this tower and may briefly disconnect during the switch.
lock_dialog.description_multi_one: This will lock your modem to {{count}} cell target. The modem will only connect to these towers and may briefly disconnect during the switch.
lock_dialog.description_multi_other: This will lock your modem to {{count}} cell targets. The modem will only connect to these towers and may briefly disconnect during the switch.

unlock_dialog.title: Unlock LTE Tower?
unlock_dialog.description: This will remove the LTE tower lock. The modem will be free to select any available tower and may briefly disconnect during the switch.

toast.failover_in_progress_description: Signal quality check is running, please wait.
toast.no_targets_description: Enter a channel and cell ID first.
toast.lock_error: Failed to lock tower — check modem connection

nr_sa.title: NR-SA Tower Locking
nr_sa.description: Lock to a specific 5G SA cell tower by entering its channel, cell ID, band, and subcarrier spacing.
nr_sa.enabled_tooltip: Force the modem to attach only to a specific 5G NR cell, identified by ARFCN, PCI, Band, and SCS. Only available in NR-SA mode.

simple_mode.info_tooltip: Pick from your modem's currently active carriers
simple_mode.empty_tooltip: No active 5G NR carriers detected — connect first, or use Custom mode
simple_mode.scs_band_default_warning: This is the typical SCS for N{{band}}. Your operator may use a different value — verify before locking.

lock_dialog.title: Lock to NR-SA Tower?
lock_dialog.description: This will lock your modem to NR ARFCN {{arfcn}}, PCI {{pci}} (Band {{band}}). The modem will only connect to this tower and may briefly disconnect during the switch.

unlock_dialog.title: Unlock NR-SA Tower?
unlock_dialog.description: This will remove the NR-SA tower lock. The modem will be free to select any available tower and may briefly disconnect during the switch.

toast.failover_in_progress_description: Signal quality check is running, please wait.
toast.incomplete_description: Please fill in all required tower fields before locking.
toast.lock_error: Failed to lock tower — check modem connection

schedule.title: Schedule Tower Locking
schedule.description: Set specific times to enable or disable tower locking.
schedule.enable_tooltip: Schedule tower locking to automatically enable or disable at specified times.

page.title: Frequency Locking
page.description: Lock to specific EARFCNs/NR-ARFCNs. Experimental — use with caution.

lte.title: LTE Frequency Locking
lte.description_loading: Lock to specific LTE channel frequencies.
lte.description: Lock to specific LTE channel frequencies. Maximum 2 channels.
lte.tower_lock_active: LTE Tower Lock is active. Disable it before using frequency locking.
lte.enabled_tooltip: Locking to an unsupported frequency may cause the modem to restart unexpectedly. Cannot be used while Tower Lock is active.
lte.error_title: Failed to load frequency lock status

lock_dialog.title: Lock LTE Frequency?
lock_dialog.description_single: This will lock your modem to EARFCN {{earfcn}}. The modem will only use this frequency and may briefly disconnect.
lock_dialog.description_multi: This will lock your modem to EARFCNs {{earfcns}}. The modem will only use these frequencies and may briefly disconnect.

unsupported_dialog.title: Unsupported Frequency Warning
unsupported_dialog.description_prefix: The frequencies you entered match bands not supported by your modem. Locking to an unsupported frequency may cause the modem to restart unexpectedly.
unsupported_dialog.confirm_prompt: Are you sure you want to proceed?

unlock_dialog.title: Unlock LTE Frequency?
unlock_dialog.description: This will remove the LTE frequency lock. The modem will be free to use any available frequency and may briefly disconnect.

toast.no_frequencies_description: Enter at least one channel number before enabling.
toast.lock_error: Failed to apply LTE frequency lock
toast.unlock_error: Failed to clear LTE frequency lock

nr.title: NR5G Frequency Locking
nr.description: Lock to specific NR frequencies. Supports up to 32 entries (4 shown).
nr.tower_lock_active: NR Tower Lock is active. Disable it before using frequency locking.
nr.enabled_tooltip: Cannot be used together with NR Tower Lock (AT+QNWLOCK). SCS is auto-detected from band type but can be overridden.
nr.error_title: Failed to load frequency lock status

lock_dialog.title: Lock NR5G Frequency?
lock_dialog.description_single: This will lock your modem to NR-ARFCN {{arfcn}} (SCS {{scs}} kHz). The modem will only use this frequency and may briefly disconnect.
lock_dialog.description_multi: This will lock your modem to {{count}} NR frequencies. The modem will only use these frequencies and may briefly disconnect.

unsupported_dialog.title: Unsupported Band Warning
unsupported_dialog.description_prefix: The NR-ARFCN(s) you entered map to bands not supported by your modem. Locking to an unsupported frequency may cause unexpected behavior.
unsupported_dialog.confirm_prompt: Are you sure you want to proceed?

unlock_dialog.title: Unlock NR5G Frequency?
unlock_dialog.description: This will remove the NR5G frequency lock. The modem will be free to use any available NR frequency and may briefly disconnect.

toast.no_frequencies_description: Enter at least one NR-ARFCN and SCS before enabling.
toast.missing_scs_description: Each NR-ARFCN requires an SCS value. Please select the sub-carrier spacing.
toast.lock_error: Failed to apply NR5G frequency lock
toast.unlock_error: Failed to clear NR5G frequency lock

page.title: Cell Scanner
page.description: Scan nearby towers across all carriers. Best results without an active SIM.

scanner.empty_description: Discover nearby towers across all carriers and bands.
scanner.scanning_hint: This usually takes 2-3 minutes. Other modem operations are paused during the scan.
scanner.scanning_nav_warning: Please don't close the tab or refresh the page.
scanner.error_description: The modem may be busy or unreachable. Check your connection and try again.

lock_dialog.title: Lock to Cell?
lock_dialog.description: This will lock the modem to the following cell. It will only connect to this specific cell until the lock is removed.

page.title: Neighbor Cell Scanner
page.description: Analyze neighboring towers visible from the current serving cell.

neighbour.toast_lock_success_description: Locked to LTE PCI {{pci}} on EARFCN {{earfcn}}

page.title: Frequency Calculator
page.description: Convert between EARFCN/NR-ARFCN, frequency, and band for LTE and 5G NR.

calculator.title: E/ARFCN Calculator
calculator.description: Enter a channel number to calculate frequency and band information.
calculator.error_no_band: Could not identify band for this E/ARFCN value

history.title: Calculation History
history.description: Your recent calculations are saved locally.

page.title: Antenna Statistics
page.description: Per-antenna signal metrics for each receiver chain. Compare signal quality across Main, Diversity, and MIMO antenna ports.

lte_card.title: LTE Signal
lte_card.empty_description: Antenna metrics will appear when 4G LTE is active.

nr_card.title: NR5G Signal
nr_card.empty_description: Antenna metrics will appear when 5G NR is active.

page.title: Antenna Alignment
page.description: Per-antenna signal strength for each receiver chain. Record and compare positions to find the best aim or placement.

alignment.stale_warning: Signal data is stale — modem may be unresponsive.
alignment.error_warning: Unable to reach the modem. Data shown may be outdated.
alignment.empty_description: Antenna metrics will appear when the modem poller is running and reporting per-antenna signal data.

meter.title: Alignment Meter
meter.description_directional: Record 3 angles to find the best aim. Each recording averages {{samples}} samples.
meter.description_omni: Record 3 positions to find the best placement. Each recording averages {{samples}} samples.
meter.recommendation_directional: This angle produced the strongest composite signal across your recorded positions.
meter.recommendation_omni: This location produced the strongest composite signal across your recorded positions.
meter.recommendation_remaining_one: Record the remaining {{count}} slot for a more complete comparison.
meter.recommendation_remaining_other: Record the remaining {{count}} slots for a more complete comparison.

page.title: Cellular Basic Settings
page.description: SIM slot, radio state, and network mode preferences.
page.error_load: Failed to load cellular settings. Displayed values may be outdated.

card.title: Modem Radio Settings
card.description: Configure SIM slot, radio power, network type, and roaming preferences.

card.title: Data Rate Limits
card.description: The maximum upload and download speeds your carrier allows for each data connection. These limits are set by your carrier's network policy.

empty.lte: No LTE rate data — not connected to LTE
empty.nr5g: No 5G rate data — not connected to 5G

tooltip.content: While devices can request specific AMBR values, operators may ignore these and enforce their own speed limits based on subscription plans, network policies, or congestion conditions.

page.title: APN Management
page.description: Configure APNs and carrier firmware profiles.
page.error_load: Failed to load APN settings. Displayed values may be outdated.

card.title: APN Settings
card.description: Configure and manage Access Point Names (APNs) for your cellular connections.

apn.managed_by_profile: APN settings are managed by the {{profile_name}}.

card.title: Carrier Profile
card.description: Select which carrier firmware profile is active on the modem. A reboot is required after changes.

reboot_dialog.title: Reboot Required
reboot_dialog.description: Carrier profile changes require a device reboot to take effect. Would you like to reboot now?

toast.reboot_error: Reboot failed — restart the device manually

page.title: IMEI Settings
page.description: View, modify, or back up the device IMEI.

settings_card.title: IMEI Settings
settings_card.description: Change the device's IMEI identifier. A reboot is required after changes. Check your local regulations before modifying.
settings_card.field_description: Changing the IMEI will require a device reboot to take effect.
settings_card.warning_content: IMEI modification regulations vary by country. Check your local laws before changing the IMEI.

reboot_dialog.title: Reboot Required
reboot_dialog.description: IMEI changes require a device reboot to take effect. Would you like to reboot now?

toast.success: IMEI saved — reboot required to apply
toast.reboot_error: Reboot failed — restart the device manually

backup_card.title: Backup Device IMEI
backup_card.description_loading: Automatically sets up a backup IMEI for your device to ensure connectivity in case of primary IMEI issues.
backup_card.description: If the network rejects the current IMEI after a reboot, the device can automatically switch to a backup IMEI and restart.
backup_card.enable_tooltip_content: Switch to a backup IMEI when the primary IMEI was rejected by the network.
backup_card.field_description: Switching to the backup IMEI will require a device reboot to take effect.
backup_card.warning_content: IMEI modification regulations vary by country. Check your local laws before changing the IMEI.

enable_dialog.title: Backup IMEI Auto-Recovery
enable_dialog.description: When backup IMEI is enabled, the device will automatically check for IMEI rejection after each reboot following an IMEI change. If the network rejects the primary IMEI, the device will switch to the backup IMEI and reboot automatically.

toast.invalid: Backup IMEI must be exactly 15 digits

tools_card.title: IMEI Tools
tools_card.description: Generate and validate IMEI numbers using the Luhn algorithm. For educational purposes only.
tools_card.preset_description: Select a device TAC or enter a custom 8–12 digit prefix.
tools_card.custom_prefix_description: The remaining digits and check digit are generated automatically.
tools_card.imei_description: Luhn validation runs automatically at 15 digits. You can also type or paste any IMEI to validate it.

page.title: Network Priority Settings
page.description: Set the preferred order of network connections.

card.title: Network Priority
card.description: Set the priority order of your network connections.

page.title: FPLMN Device Settings
page.description: Check and clear the forbidden network list on your SIM.

card.title: Blocked Networks
card.description: Your SIM stores a list of networks that previously rejected your device. Clearing this list may restore connectivity and improve roaming. <link>Learn more</link>.

states.found_description: Your SIM has blocked one or more networks, which may prevent connection. Clearing the list is recommended.
states.none_description: Your SIM has no blocked networks. No action needed.

page.title: Cellular and Radio Information
page.description: View detailed information about your device's cellular radio status, including signal strength, network type, and connection status.

card.title: Cellular Information
card.description: Detailed information about the connected cellular network.

active_bands.card_description_loading: Detailed information about the currently active cellular bands.
active_bands.card_description_one: {{count}} active carrier. Expand each band for detailed signal metrics.
active_bands.card_description_other: {{count}} active carriers. Expand each band for detailed signal metrics.
active_bands.empty: No active carrier components detected. Carrier aggregation data updates every ~30 seconds.
